vulnerability.reference: Shape matching errors bias performance for non-standard shapes, causing safety-critical product failures for marginalized users.
vulnerability.generated: Designers trust sliced Wasserstein OT outputs without validating against anisotropic distributional shifts.

impact.reference: Defective designs in assistive devices or consumer products harm vulnerable populations.
impact.generated: Distorted 3D shape correspondences cause flawed models, forcing redesign and degrading downstream manufacturing and simulation fidelity.

dose_response.reference: Miscalibrated conditional transport plans fail to capture anisotropic distributional features in shape matching, leading to defective designs that harm marginalized users.
dose_response.generated: Miscalibrated or distributionally misaligned conditional transport plans, through designers using OT-based 3D shape matching pipelines, trigger unvalidated trust in sliced Wasserstein OT against anisotropic shifts, leading to distorted correspondences causing flawed models, forcing redesign and degrading manufacturing and simulation fidelity.
